---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for DERMS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- A clear description of the problem or gap this feature addresses.
     Example: "As an operator, I cannot currently see real-time battery SoC across
     all sites in a single dashboard, which makes manual dispatch decisions slow." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see implemented.
     Be as specific as possible — include API shapes, UI mockups, or algorithm sketches
     if relevant. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- List any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they were
     ruled out or are less preferred. -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Optional but helpful. What does "done" look like?
     - [ ] API endpoint returns ...
     - [ ] Unit tests cover ...
     - [ ] Documentation updated ... -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, links to relevant standards (e.g., IEEE 2030.5, OpenADR),
     related issues, or academic references. -->
